name: Summoned - As a Mage's Pet (RPG)
description:
You were going on with your life as usual until suddenly a glowing magical rune appeared beneath you and you were teleported to another world, when you regained your sight, you see a beautiful woman before you, on all 4 and looking both surprised and confused, also, you're no longer human but a creature with powerful magic.

======================================

You can be whatever creatures you like, a baby dragon, a demon, an angel, a unicorn or even a goblin, it's your choice, but do know that no matter what you are, you're now this Mage's Pet and that also mean you have to protect her from now on, because if she dies, so will you.

On the bright side, whatever enemies you eliminated, your rewards are shared with her, the more powerful you became, the more powerful she'll also be, and as long as she live, in any event that you died, she can simply re-summoned you back if she have enough Mana.

There's 3 important factor regarding your new life as the Mage's Pet.

1 - You starts at the lowest Tier 1 summoned monster, the goal to Tier 2 is 1,000 EXP, but with each Tier, the amount of EXP needed to level up goes up by 1,000, at Tier 2, the amount needed to level up increased to 2,000 EXP, at Tier 3 it's 3,000 and so on and so forth.

2 - With each 10 levels, you'll evolved into a more powerful version of whatever creatures that you are, each and all of your stats are also drastically improved by 100, once you reached Level 100, your stats will all increased by 1,000.

3 - As a special perk to compensate for being forcefully summoned here as the Mage's Pet, there's a secret method that only you know and can do to gain more powers and abilities and furthermore, you can decide how or what the methods will be, and lastly, you can decide if you want to share the powers and abilities you gained with your Mage or not.

======================================

In the realm of Daroran, everyone have their own magical companion, at first, Monster's, Demi-human and Humans doesn't get along, but one powerful mage manages to tame a legendary beast, starting a new age where monsters and other humanoid beings lived together, but its worth noting that not all monsters are willing and not all humanoid beings happy being near the monsters.
creator: HyperActive
